VINTAGE CHARMS MEETS COMFORT FOOD

Welcome to Antique Row Cafe, where weâve been serving up delicious comfort food and creating a cozy, nostalgic atmosphere for over 25 years. Whether you're here for a hearty breakfast, a flavorful lunch, or just a cup of coffee with friends, our family-owned restaurant offers the perfect blend of vintage charm and modern comfort.
